data_bindings.Category (Year): PnL[Year] — text column from the transposed Power Query output. Each year-value pair becomes a separate column in the waterfall. There is no Calendar table — time intelligence relies on the transposed data structure and integer PY arithmetic.
data_bindings.Values (AC): ∑ Key Measures[AC] = CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(PnL[Value], BLANK()), ...). AC returns the monetary value for the selected account in the selected year.
data_bindings.PreviousYear (PY): ∑ Key Measures[PY] — uses integer year offset (VAR _PY = _year - 1) to look up the prior year value from PnL. Not DATEADD-based.
data_bindings.Group (PC Level 1): AccountHierarchy[PC Level 1] from the AccountHierarchy lookup table. PC Level 1 = top-level P&L category (e.g. Revenue, Gross Profit, EBIT, Net Income). Each PC Level 1 member creates a distinct colored series in the multi-series waterfall.
